message:
chore: add Vercel config for monorepo deployment

Configure Vercel to build from apps/web directory in the monorepo
and output to the correct Next.js build directory.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+{
+  "$schema": "https://openapi.vercel.sh/vercel.json",
+  "buildCommand": "cd apps/web && bun run build",
+  "devCommand": "cd apps/web && bun run dev",
+  "installCommand": "bun install",
+  "outputDirectory": "apps/web/.next",
+  "framework": "nextjs"
+}
